title: Aging and seniors - Canada.ca
content:
Health promotion and wellbeing, ways to stay active, fall  prevention, emergency preparedness, mental health, substance use, and elder  abuse.
- Family violence in Canada

## Services and information
Symptoms and treatment, how you can help, risk factors and prevention, what Canada's doing
Options to help people manage their pain, support for people living with pain

### Preventing falls and injuries for older adults
Impact of falls and injuries, risk of falls, preventing falls, safe driving

### Age-friendly communities
What an age-friendly  community looks like, becoming recognized, provincial and territorial  initiatives

### Oral health for seniors
Connection between oral health and general health,    caring for dentures and implants, dry mouth

### Using substances as an older adult
Substance use and talking to your health care  provider

### Life changes experienced by older adults
Mental health and importance of maintaining social connections as you age and move through transitions later in life

### Healthy eating for seniors
Eating habits that promote and protect health and    well-being

### Programs and services for seniors
Income supports, caring benefits, services for    veterans, fraud prevention, safety at home, managing your money

### Guides for senior safety and security
Community guide for seniors and their caregivers,    safety concerns, frauds and scams

### National Seniors Council
Engagement with seniors, stakeholders and  experts on current and emerging issues related to quality of life of seniors
